comment.body:
there is a threat from the EU towards US that they sell US equities if Trump goes harder on them. 
meanwhile rotation is ongoing. 

some insider institutions are trying to keep this shit together. buyback programs not only equities but bonds etc.
they manage volatility.

but until the diplomacy is not clear, market is under pressure.
but no blackswan.
blackswan is managed. 
downside is protected.
if selling happens, it is more like a "spot decay" trend like last year feb to march
